subcodes.first_line: O 'Aṭá! The renowned poet spoke no falsehood when he said: "A friend cannot be given to both this world and the hereafter; the companionship of Joseph..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عطا شاعر معروف خطا ننمود که گفت دوست بدنیا و آخرت نتوان داد صحبت یوسف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry
